## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      1 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: May 18, 2026 - May 18, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Jonas Huovila_, May 18, 2026, 4/5: "Freezes/Slow to open up sometimes, besides that an AWESOME APP!!! ❤❤❤"

## **Sync and accounts** {#theme-sync_accounts}

   **Sync and accounts.**
      1 recent review(s) mention sync and accounts.
      Review window: Jan 28, 2026 - Feb 1, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention sync, backup, login, or accounts. This points to trust and cross-device workflow expectations.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Calvin Van Beek_, Feb 1, 2026, 1/5: "cant use it at the moment with the oneplus 15. because sign in doesnt work. none of the accounts are working. Apple account doesnt even start up. Google account keeps loading and never finishes. So cant use it. switched to a different app which is working fine. pity i always liked the app."
            2. _Johan Andersson_, Jan 28, 2026, 1/5: "Our daughter wanted to join Runkeeper but only get a error that says account is locked so I mailed the support. for that they have received my mail and someone will look in to in 3 business days. that was 3 month ago. You get no errand or ID on the ticket. I liked runkeeper before and even paid for it."
